name: wikicodex
description: Monorepo base de WikiCodex con frontend en React + Vite y backend en Node.js + Express.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n frontend,backend -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix frontend && npm run lint --prefix backend
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix --prefix frontend && npm run lint:fix --prefix backend
scripts.format: npm run format --prefix frontend && npm run format --prefix backend
scripts.format:write: npm run format:write --prefix frontend && npm run format:write --prefix backend
